source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the signal flow diagram given in the figure, \( u_1 \) and \( u_2 \) are possible inputs, whereas \( y_1 \) and \( y_2 \) are possible outputs. When would the SISO system derived from this diagram be controllable and observable?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: When \( u_2 \) is the only input and \( y_1 \) is the only output

choice_map.A: When \( u_1 \) is the only input and \( y_1 \) is the only output
choice_map.B: When \( u_2 \) is the only input and \( y_1 \) is the only output
choice_map.C: When \( u_1 \) is the only input and \( y_2 \) is the only output
choice_map.D: When \( u_2 \) is the only input and \( y_2 \) is the only output
